title: panisea zeylanica
intro: Panisea zeylanica, also known as the Ceylonese Panisea, is a species of orchid native to Sri Lanka. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Panisea zeylanica include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Panisea zeylanica can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments.
